title: Booking Calendar with Conflict Detection
description: ARCHETYPE: booking_app. Shape: a Bookings table with date + time + guest_name fields, endpoints to create and list bookings, with a GUARD that prevents double-booking (same date + time slot). The guard is the CORE differentiator — this is what makes it a booking_app, not a generic CRUD. DO NOT skip the guard. Include: POST /api/bookings (creates, guards against conflicts), GET /api/bookings (lists all). The guard should reject any POST where a booking already exists with the same date AND time combination. Return 400 with message 'Slot already booked' on conflict.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Bookings table:
  guest_name, required
  date, required
  time, required
  notes
  created_at_date, auto

# Your endpoints here — POST must guard against double-booking the same date+time
